ATHLETICS

Men's Basketball Schedule Roster Statistics News PBA Holiday Hoops Classic Additional Links

2025-26 Men's Basketball Roster

Dan Calvelli
Wilma Ritzen

5 Jamaal Walker

  • Position G/F
  • Ht./Wt. 6-5 / 194
  • Class Graduate Student
  • Hometown Chattanooga, Tenn.
  • Highschool East Hamilton HS
  • Prev School University of Tennessee-Chattanooga
  • Bio
  • Related
  • Stats
  • Historical

Biography

PERSONAL
Born July 24... Majoring in Math... Aspires to become as Actuary after his playing career... Favorite Bible verse is John 3:16... Favorite athlete is Shai Gilgeous-Alexander... Favorite team is the LA Lakers... Has one sibling, Jada... Son of Alfred and Jamika.

2025-26 (Graduate Student)
Missed most of the season due to injury... Appeared in PBA's NCAA Regional game against Alabama-Huntsville, converting on his one shot attempt and grabbing one rebound.

2024-25 (Senior)
Started 25 of 29 games… Scored 239 total points… Made 92 of 206 field goals… Converted 54 of 80 free throws… Recorded 89 total rebounds, with 34 offensive and 55 defensive… Tallied 37 assists and 27 steals… Played 697 minutes… Averaged 8.2 points and 3.1 rebounds per game... Scored a season-high 21 points against Florida Southern... Grabbed a season-best seven rebounds against Rollins... Shot 45 percent from the field... Scored double-digits in 10 different games.

2023-24 (Junior)
Played in all 29 games for the Sailfish, including 17 starts... Averaged 13.5 points, 4.0 rebounds, and 1.4 assists in 25.0 minutes per game... Finished first on the team with a 55 percent field-goal percentage and second on the team in scoring... His field-goal percentage was the sixth-best single season mark in PBA's DII-era... Shot 46 percent from 3-point range on 22 attempts... Scored 10+ points in 23 games... Came on strong at the end of the season, scoring double-digit points in his last 10 games... Had four games with 20+ points... Scored a career-high 30 points with three assists and two rebounds against SSC Champion Nova Southeastern (Feb. 17)... Tallied 26 points in games against Tampa (Jan. 24) and Rollins (Feb. 3)... Put up 22 points and six rebounds in a win over Tampa on Feb. 10... Grabbed a season-high eight rebounds against Florida Southern on Dec. 30... Totaled 16 points, seven rebounds, and a season-high five assists in a win over Puerto Rico-Mayaguez.

PREVIOUS SCHOOL - Chattanooga (2019-23)
Spent four seasons at the University of Tennessee - Chattanooga... Made 13 starts in the 56 games he appeared in over his career with the Mocs... Averaged 20 minutes per game and five points per game... Scored in double figures seven times last season and had a season-high 16 points at Western Carolina.

HIGH SCHOOL
Played for legendary Chattanooga prep coach Frank Jones at East Hamilton… Averaged 17 points, five rebounds, two assists and two steals per game as a senior... Helped lead the squad to a 22-10 mark earning All-District honors.
